title: Letter written by Mary, Queen of Scots, prior to beheading draws crowds
summary_full: The letter, written in prison six hours before her execution, is on display in Scotland for the first time in 30 years, enthralling crowds and conspiracy theorists.
summary_public: The letter, written in prison six hours before her execution, is on display in Scotland for the first time in 30 years, enthralling crowds and conspiracy theorists.
